positive: A stylized, minimalist depiction of a mystical forest clearing at dawn. The central element is a glowing, ethereal silhouette of intertwined roots and abstract foliage forming a semi-circle. Subtle, bioluminescent motes of light drift through the canopy. Use a color palette of deep sapphire blues, emerald greens, and touches of luminous gold for contrast. The composition must be centered, favoring clean lines and graphic impact suitable for direct apparel printing. Style: Neo-Art Deco meets botanical illustration. Lighting: Soft, directional backlit glow, high contrast silhouette against the glow. Focus on intricate, repeating natural patterns.
negative: text, watermark, signature, logo, script, blurry, grainy, artifacts, low detail, poorly drawn, extra limbs, bad anatomy, cropped, disfigured, noise
